FragmentEntryLink.__html: A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
FragmentEntryLink.__editableValues:
{"com.liferay.fragment.entry.processor.editable.EditableFragmentEntryProcessor":{"element-text":{"sv_SE":"Anvisningar","defaultValue":"
	A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with
	a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of
	formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
","pt_BR":"Instruções","ja_JP":"説明","fr_FR":"Instructions","hu_HU":"Utasítások","de_DE":"Anweisungen","ca_ES":"Instruccions","ar_SA":"التعليمات","fi_FI":"Ohjeet","en_US":"Instructions","zh_CN":"说明","es_ES":"Instrucciones","config":{"mapperType":"link"},"nl_NL":"Instructies"}}}
